scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n domain,shared,api,web -c blue,magenta,green,cyan "npm run dev -w packages/domain" "npm run dev -w packages/shared" "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
